name: Rice Pudding with Blueberries
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the rice and milk in a saucepan or in the top of a double boiler and cook until very soft, about 45 minutes.
2. Stir in sugar and nutmeg. Cool slightly.
3. Fold in blueberries.
4. Whip the cream and vanilla together.
5. Pour the pudding into a broiler-proof dish and top with whipped cream.
6. Place under the broiler and brown the top slightly.
7. Sprinkle additional berries on top if desired.
8. Serve immediately.
